creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
glarkin     2010-07-29 19:04:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils/alexandria Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    deskutils/alexandria/files patch-Rakefile 
  Removed files:
    deskutils/alexandria/files patch-tasks.rb 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.6.6
  - Remove stale patch
  - Depend on textproc/rubygem-htmlentities as required in INSTALL - w/o it
    alexandria uses just 3 book info providers instead of 10.
  - Conditionally depend on ruby-image_size as specified in INSTALL
  - Install alexandria.scheme via Rakefile, not manually
  - Fix manpage installation path
  
  PR:             ports/148168
  Submitted by:   Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src at yandex dot ru>
  Approved by:    mitsuru@riken.jp (maintainer, timeout - 33 days)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.21      +9 -6      ports/deskutils/alexandria/Makefile
  1.6       +3 -3      ports/deskutils/alexandria/distinfo
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/deskutils/alexandria/files/patch-Rakefile (new)
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/deskutils/alexandria/files/patch-tasks.rb (dead)
  1.8       +23 -20    ports/deskutils/alexandria/pkg-plist
